query: SELECT symbol, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM watchlists WHERE userId = 1 GROUP BY symbol HAVING cnt > 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2m8TNWgPuPvRJRa.1b4cee6bb564 --database dA3LRtUEtHSvLVLz3WfwfJ --execute SELECT symbol, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM watchlists WHERE userId = 1 GROUP BY symbol HAVING cnt > 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10;
